query: Wang Yi China Foreign Minister visit South Korea 2026 postponed Taiwan dispute rescheduled July August 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the bottom line:

**Wang Yi's planned 2026 visit to South Korea was effectively put on hold/left unscheduled amid a Taiwan-labeling dispute, and no confirmed July or August 2026 rescheduled date could be found in public reporting.**

Key findings:
- **The trigger:** On March 31, 2026, South Korea removed the "China (Taiwan)" label from its electronic entry cards (by eliminating destination fields entirely). Beijing objected, and Korean media reported China put Wang's visit "on hold." Seoul's Foreign Ministry denied the delay was Taiwan-related, calling the form change an "administrative adjustment."
- **Status (as of late April 2026):** No concrete dates set; both sides "still communicating" but "not yet exchanging views on a concrete schedule." The strained atmosphere "cast doubt on the possibility of a visit this year."
- **Escalation:** China also blocked ROK intelligence chief Lee Jong-seok from a Beijing delegation (~April 20, 2026) over his remarks on using Taiwan as leverage.
- **Wang's actual schedule:** He visited North Korea (~April 10) and toured four Nordic countries (July 2–8, 2026) — with no reported Seoul stop.
- **No July/August 2026 rescheduling confirmed:** My most detailed sourcing dates to April 2026; I could not locate any reporting confirming a firm rescheduled date or a completed visit in the July–August window. Note also that APEC 2026 is hosted by China (not Korea), so there's no APEC pretext for a Seoul visit this year.

The full report with sources and structured data has been submitted.

sources.title: Foreign ministry says no details finalized for Wang Yi's South Korea visit / China puts Wang Yi's Seoul visit on hold over Taiwan labeling dispute
sources.snippet: No specific dates finalized for Wang Yi's Seoul visit; local media report China put visit on hold over removal of 'China (Taiwan)' label; Seoul FM calls it an administrative adjustment.
